final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide illustration for the Changan Qiyuan Q06 launch announcement, intended for a brand presentation deck.

Style/medium: automotive brand PPT cover, photorealistic CGI render with dramatic depth
Composition: full-bleed hero layout, title and subtitle text overlaid on lower third, strong visual hierarchy
Subject: Changan Qiyuan Q06 as hero vehicle, positioned dynamically against a vast atmospheric backdrop
Scene/backdrop: expansive, translucent and immersive environment — deep space or futuristic cityscape with volumetric light rays and atmospheric haze, conveying scale and impact
Lighting/mood: dramatic, high-contrast volumetric lighting; awe-inspiring and forward-looking; sense of arrival and revelation
Color palette: deep midnight blue and electric teal with warm golden accent highlights, consistent with Changan Qiyuan brand identity
Materials/textures: sleek metallic vehicle surfaces, glass-like translucent atmospheric layers, subtle light bloom
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06" as primary title, "将于9月上市" as subtitle
Constraints: text must be legible against the background; layout must work as a 16:9 widescreen slide cover
Avoid: generic stock-photo car backgrounds, cluttered composition, low-contrast text, clichéd starburst effects
